medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Severe intellectual delay, expressive language skills minimal, hyperphagia at 7 years of age, AS-like features including running with hands raised, poor coordination, and inappropriate laughter, autistic traits, hypotonia, strabismus, fecal incontinence, kyphosis, adenoidectomy at age seven
medical_history.past_medical_history: Born via caesarean section at 35 weeks, preterm premature rupture of membranes, normal growth parameters at birth, deceleration of head circumference resulting in microcephaly, increase in weight relative to height

physical_examination.general_examination: Microcephaly, brachycephalic, broad forehead, mild hypertelorism, widened mouth, thin upper lip, frontal upsweep, low anterior hairline, hypertrichosis, short neck, clinodactyly of fifth finger, pes planus
